title: Donut Lab Meant What They Said About That New Solid-State EV Battery
description:
Full details about the new solid-state EV battery from the Finnish startup Donut Lab are now available on the company's website.

The post Donut Lab Meant What They Said About That New Solid-State EV Battery appeared first on CleanTechnica.
